query: set up movie night: drop the brightness to 2 and turn on dark mode
I'm going to bed — turn on airplane mode, turn off wifi, and set brightness to 0
privacy mode: turn off location access for Maps and turn off Spotify notifications
battery saver: lower the brightness by 3 and set animation speed to 1
personalize my phone: rename it to Falcon and set the wallpaper to Nebula
focus setup: turn off bluetooth, mute Spotify notifications, and set the screen timeout to 1
crank the display: set brightness, text size, and screen timeout all to the max
enable airplane mode, then turn wifi back on and switch on the hotspot
increase the brightness by 4 and turn on dark mode
guest setup: turn off Maps notifications, turn off Spotify notifications, and rename the device to Guest
